case_title: MARQUES, MANUEL vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

PHONE CALL FROM PLAINTIFF THAT 2 ARBS ARE ASSOCIATED WITH CASE AND WOULD LIKE NEW PANEL. NEW PANEL SENT THIS DATE; REJECT DATE OF 12/7/93; REC'D NAMES OF STEGER P. JOHNSON, RONALD P. SCHNEIDER AND ROBERT HENRY BLUMENTHAL.
DEFT. REJECTS STEGER P. JOHNSON AS ARBITRATOR.
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED RITCHIE, JAMES ROBERT (055134), ARB-5 MAILED
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, BLUMENTHAL, ROBERT H (031203), ARB-5 MAILED
ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04

PHONE ARBITRATOR FOR SECOND TIME ASKING WHEN AWARD WOULD BE FILED; PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN CALLING THE COURT ASKING IF AN AWARD HAS BEEN FILED; ARB HEARING WAS 2/4/94-IT'S BEEN OVER 2 MONTHS AND NO AWARD IS ON FILE. AFTER 1ST PHONE CALL MR. BLUMENTHAL'S SECRETARY WAS TO CHECK AND CALL ME BACK.

SHE NEVER CALLED BACK. CALLED TODAY AND ANOTHER SECRETARY TOLD ME THE AWARD HAD BEEN DICTATED AND ASSUMED IT HAD BEEN SENT OUT, WOULD LOOK FOR IT AND CALL ME IN EITHER CASE SO I COULD TELL PLAINTIFF WHAT ARB'S OFFICE SAID.
LETTER SENT OUT FROM COURT ASKING WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DO A OSC ON ARB FOR FAILURE TO FILE AWARD TIMELY; RESPONSE DUE BY 5/2/94.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-23-1994, CONTINUED TO JUN-22-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ARBITRATION AWARD. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
